# PayCalc — Canadian Salary & Income Tax Calculator

> https://paycalc.ca

## What is PayCalc?
PayCalc is a free, bilingual (English/French) Canadian salary and income tax calculator for the 2026 tax year. It helps Canadians estimate their take-home pay after federal and provincial taxes, CPP/QPP, EI, and QPIP deductions.

## Features
- Salary ↔ hourly rate conversion
- Federal + provincial tax breakdown for all 13 provinces and territories
- CPP, CPP2, EI, QPIP deduction calculations
- Ontario Health Premium and surtax
- Quebec federal abatement (16.5%)
- RRSP deduction support
- Side-by-side province comparison
- Marginal and effective tax rate display
- Tax bracket reference tables
- Minimum wage by province

## Supported Provinces
Alberta, British Columbia, Manitoba, New Brunswick, Newfoundland and Labrador, Nova Scotia, Northwest Territories, Nunavut, Ontario, Prince Edward Island, Quebec, Saskatchewan, Yukon

## Languages
- English: https://paycalc.ca/en
- French: https://paycalc.ca/fr

## Key Pages
- Home (calculator): /en or /fr
- Province pages: /en/province/{slug} or /fr/province/{slug}
- Compare provinces: /en/compare or /fr/compare
- Tax brackets: /en/tax-brackets or /fr/tax-brackets
- Minimum wage: /en/minimum-wage or /fr/minimum-wage
- Guides: /en/guides or /fr/guides
